headline: LegalZoom and GoDaddy (GDDY) Partner on Business Formation Services
summary: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE:GDDY) is one of the 9 Most Profitable Undervalued Stocks to Buy Now. On April 15, 2026, LegalZoom (LZ) and GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE:GDDY) announced a strategic partnership that makes LegalZoom the exclusive legal services provider within GoDaddy’s ecosystem. The collaboration allows customers to access LegalZoom’s business formation services directly through the GoDaddy platform, […]
